context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 219 rispondi domande feature fully tested. Key features: 1) POST /api/istruttoria/{id}/rispondi saves user answers to domande_residue. 2) Payload format: {risposte: [{domanda_idx: 0, risposta: 'text'}, ...]}. 3) Endpoint validates empty payload (400), non-existent istruttoria (404). 4) Answers merge with existing (don't replace). 5) Frontend Textarea inputs have data-testid='risposta-input-{i}'. 6) Save button has data-testid='btn-salva-risposte'. 7) 'Risposto' badge appears on answered questions. 8) Author/date info shown below each answered question.
